title: Why Deep Sleep Disappears After 40 (And How to Restore It)
seo_title: Deep Sleep After 40: Why It Shrinks and How to Get It Back
meta_description: Deep sleep after 40 drops due to hormonal changes. Learn what causes it, what it costs your health, and how to restore slow-wave sleep naturally.
tags: deep sleep, sleep quality, women over 40, slow wave sleep, melatonin, sleep stages, supplements
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: After 40, most women lose significant amounts of deep sleep without realizing it. Learn why slow-wave sleep declines with hormonal changes and what you can do to restore it.
